title: hieracium carpathicum subsp. obtusissimum
intro: Hieracium carpathicum subsp. obtusissimum is a subspecies of the Hieracium carpathicum plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, which is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium carpathicum subsp. obtusissimum include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
